---
title: "MPP"
toc: true
toc-location: left
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(httr2)
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
library(kableExtra)


token <- "eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCIsImtpZCI6IllOb0d0ZVg5VVV1THh5WFJTOF9QRSJ9..aPJP8W_CJAxbbFkrvZCCYTicHMTa_Q8JDqkI5IIlCjQHrxRYrOKKc_9MPAXNYcBqaQdSuzk_N3eDEA1xGYvQzVDxRK91w1YGdK3h4AJiNjDlcn69UzG_JbiA5YWpj6w9uWDNipjah3NTbnFJHGB6v-8U9z0TzXDID47XeFOyK7b4KngswFqIaCWd2XKDkcPTHXqgTcX4AadP-9YKldzlSJQG-jkx9Cd4OewtZT2u0J_l4KVkDF_UxVFtK0Cqu3qDpJrSZ3eS_nn7RwAbZbZq-w__I5hUPcJX99N5cXFYJjemGjDPLweqb2-KA82J0NPlxAjW11_ZzMhKd0OH9zdkDA"  # ton token complet

fetch_history <- function(before_date = NULL, id_user = "10796256") {
  url <- paste0("https://api.mpp.football/user-match-forecasts/championship/8/history?userId=user_", id_user, "&limitDays=3")
  if (!is.null(before_date)) url <- paste0(url, "&beforeDate=", before_date)
  
  request(url) |>
    req_headers(
      "Authorization"   = paste("Bearer", token),
      "app-context"     = "internationalEvent",
      "application"     = "mppLfp",
      "client-language" = "fr-FR",
      "client-version"  = "11.12.0",
      "platform"        = "web",
      "Origin"          = "https://mpp.football",
      "Referer"         = "https://mpp.football/"
    ) |>
    req_perform() |>
    resp_body_json(simplifyVector = TRUE)
}


donnees <- list(
  "Thibaud" = "10796256",
  "Maël" = "2882159",
  "Eric" = "11705902",
  "Eno" = "11692701",
  "Marianne" = "11774379",
  "Toutoune" = "10838387",
  "Quentin" = "10782715",
  "Sam" = "11642865",
  "Benou" = "6183861",
  "Polo" = "11097863"
) %>%
  map(~ seq(as.Date("2026-06-11"), Sys.Date(), by = "day") |>
        map(fetch_history, id_user = .x) |>
        map(pluck, "matchesByDate") |>
        list_flatten()
  ) %>%
  map(
    ~ .x[!duplicated(names(.x))] |>
      (\(x) x[sort(names(x))])()
  ) %>%
  imap(\(x, idx)
       x %>% bind_rows() %>%
         transmute(id_match = str_remove_all(pattern = "mpp_championship_match_", string = matchId), date = ymd_hms(date), points = points$total) %>%
         mutate(total = cumsum(points)) %>% mutate(Nom = idx, .before = 1)
  ) %>% bind_rows() %>% as_tibble()

```

# Toutes ligues confondues

## Evolution du nombre de point par joueur

```{r}
#| echo: false 
ggplotly(
  donnees %>%
    ggplot(aes(
      x = date,
      y = total,
      colour = Nom,
      group = Nom,
      text = paste0(Nom, "<br>Date : ", format(date, "%d %b"), "<br>Total : ", total)
    )) +            geom_point() + geom_line() +            scale_x_datetime(date_labels = "%d %b", date_breaks = "1 day"),
  tooltip = "text"
) %>% layout(autosize = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false 
medailles <- c("🥇", "🥈", "🥉", "4️⃣", "5️⃣", "6️⃣", "7️⃣", "8️⃣", "9️⃣", "🔟") 
donnees %>%   mutate_at("date", as.Date) %>%   group_by(Nom, date) %>%   
  summarize(total = max(total), .groups = "drop") %>%   
  pivot_wider(names_from = date, values_from = total) %>%   
  arrange(desc(pick(last_col()))) %>%    
  mutate(across(-Nom, ~
                  {
                    rangs <- dense_rank(desc(replace_na(.x, -Inf)))
                    ifelse(is.na(.x), NA_character_, paste(medailles[rangs], .x))
                  })) %>%   
  kbl(escape = FALSE, align = "c", row.names = FALSE) %>%   
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = TRUE)
```

## Evolution de l'écart de point

```{r}
#| echo: false 
ggplotly(donnees %>% group_by(Nom, id_match, date) %>%
           full_join(donnees %>% filter(Nom == "Thibaud") %>% transmute(id_match, date, mon_total = total), by = join_by(id_match, date)) %>%
           mutate(diff = mon_total - total) %>% ungroup() %>% filter(Nom != "Thibaud") %>%
           ggplot(aes(x = date, y = diff, colour = Nom, group = Nom,
                      text = paste0(Nom, "<br>Date : ", format(date, "%d %b"), "<br>Total : ", total, "<br>Différence : ", diff))) +
           geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed") +
           geom_point() +
           geom_line() + ylab("différence de points") +
           scale_x_datetime(date_labels = "%d %b", date_breaks = "1 day"), tooltip = "text") %>% layout(autosize = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false 
df <- donnees %>%
  group_by(Nom, id_match, date) %>%
  full_join(donnees %>% filter(Nom == "Thibaud") %>% transmute(id_match, date, mon_total = total), by = join_by(id_match, date)) %>%
  mutate(diff = mon_total - total) %>% ungroup() %>% filter(Nom != "Thibaud") %>%
  mutate_at("date", as.Date) %>%
  group_by(Nom, date) %>%
  summarize(diff = last(diff), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = date, values_from = diff) %>%
  arrange(desc(pick(last_col())))

date_cols <- setdiff(names(df), "Nom")

df_num <- df  # copie des valeurs numériques

for (i in seq_along(date_cols)) {
  col      <- date_cols[i]
  prev_col <- if (i > 1) date_cols[i - 1] else NULL
  
  fleche <- if (is.null(prev_col)) {
    rep("", nrow(df))
  } else {
    case_when(
      is.na(df_num[[col]])                        ~ "",
      df_num[[col]] > df_num[[prev_col]]          ~ '<span style="color:green">▲</span>',
      df_num[[col]] == df_num[[prev_col]]         ~ '<span style="color:purple">▶</span>',
      df_num[[col]] < df_num[[prev_col]]          ~ '<span style="color:red">▼</span>'
    )
  }
  df[[col]] <- ifelse(is.na(df_num[[col]]), NA_character_, paste(fleche, df_num[[col]]))
}

df %>%
  kbl(escape = FALSE, align = "c", row.names = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = TRUE)

```

# Copains

## Evolution du nombre de point par joueur

```{r}
#| echo: false  
ggplotly(donnees %>% filter(Nom %in% c("Benou", "Polo", "Quentin", "Sam", "Thibaud", "Toutoune")) %>% 
           ggplot(aes(x = date, y = total, colour = Nom, group = Nom,
                      text = paste0(Nom, "<br>Date : ", format(date, "%d %b"), "<br>Total : ", total))) +
           geom_point() + geom_line() +
           scale_x_datetime(date_labels = "%d %b", date_breaks = "1 day"), tooltip = "text") %>% layout(autosize = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false  
medailles <- c("🥇", "🥈", "🥉", "4️⃣", "5️⃣", "6️⃣")
donnees %>% 
  filter(Nom %in% c("Benou", "Polo", "Quentin", "Sam", "Thibaud", "Toutoune")) %>% 
  mutate_at("date", as.Date) %>%   group_by(Nom, date) %>%   
  summarize(total = max(total), .groups = "drop") %>%   
  pivot_wider(names_from = date, values_from = total) %>%   
  arrange(desc(pick(last_col()))) %>%    
  mutate(across(-Nom, ~
                  {
                    rangs <- dense_rank(desc(replace_na(.x, -Inf)))
                    ifelse(is.na(.x), NA_character_, paste(medailles[rangs], .x))
                  })) %>%   
  kbl(escape = FALSE, align = "c", row.names = FALSE) %>%   
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = TRUE)
```

## Evolution de l'écart de point

```{r}
#| echo: false  
ggplotly(donnees %>% 
           filter(Nom %in% c("Benou", "Polo", "Quentin", "Sam", "Thibaud", "Toutoune")) %>% 
           group_by(Nom, id_match, date) %>%
           full_join(donnees %>% filter(Nom == "Thibaud") %>% transmute(id_match, date, mon_total = total), by = join_by(id_match, date)) %>%
           mutate(diff = mon_total - total) %>% ungroup() %>% filter(Nom != "Thibaud") %>%
           ggplot(aes(x = date, y = diff, colour = Nom, group = Nom,
                      text = paste0(Nom, "<br>Date : ", format(date, "%d %b"), "<br>Total : ", total, "<br>Différence : ", diff))) +
           geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed") +
           geom_point() +
           geom_line() + ylab("différence de points") +
           scale_x_datetime(date_labels = "%d %b", date_breaks = "1 day"), tooltip = "text") %>% layout(autosize = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
df <- donnees %>% 
  filter(Nom %in% c("Benou", "Polo", "Quentin", "Sam", "Thibaud", "Toutoune")) %>%
  group_by(Nom, id_match, date) %>%
  full_join(donnees %>% filter(Nom == "Thibaud") %>% transmute(id_match, date, mon_total = total), by = join_by(id_match, date)) %>%
  mutate(diff = mon_total - total) %>% ungroup() %>% filter(Nom != "Thibaud") %>%
  mutate_at("date", as.Date) %>%
  group_by(Nom, date) %>%
  summarize(diff = last(diff), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = date, values_from = diff) %>%
  arrange(desc(pick(last_col())))

date_cols <- setdiff(names(df), "Nom")

df_num <- df  # copie des valeurs numériques

for (i in seq_along(date_cols)) {
  col      <- date_cols[i]
  prev_col <- if (i > 1) date_cols[i - 1] else NULL
  
  fleche <- if (is.null(prev_col)) {
    rep("", nrow(df))
  } else {
    case_when(
      is.na(df_num[[col]])                        ~ "",
      df_num[[col]] > df_num[[prev_col]]          ~ '<span style="color:green">▲</span>',
      df_num[[col]] == df_num[[prev_col]]         ~ '<span style="color:purple">▶</span>',
      df_num[[col]] < df_num[[prev_col]]          ~ '<span style="color:red">▼</span>'
    )
  }
  df[[col]] <- ifelse(is.na(df_num[[col]]), NA_character_, paste(fleche, df_num[[col]]))
}

df %>%
  kbl(escape = FALSE, align = "c", row.names = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = TRUE)
```

# Famille

## Evolution du nombre de point par joueur

```{r}
#| echo: false   
ggplotly(donnees %>% filter(Nom %in% c("Eno", "Eric", "Maël", "Marianne", "Thibaud")) %>% 
           ggplot(aes(x = date, y = total, colour = Nom, group = Nom,
                      text = paste0(Nom, "<br>Date : ", format(date, "%d %b"), "<br>Total : ", total))) +
           geom_point() + geom_line() +
           scale_x_datetime(date_labels = "%d %b", date_breaks = "1 day"), tooltip = "text") %>% layout(autosize = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
medailles <- c("🥇", "🥈", "🥉", "4️⃣", "5️⃣")
donnees %>% 
  filter(Nom %in% c("Eno", "Eric", "Maël", "Marianne", "Thibaud")) %>% 
  mutate_at("date", as.Date) %>%   group_by(Nom, date) %>%   
  summarize(total = max(total), .groups = "drop") %>%   
  pivot_wider(names_from = date, values_from = total) %>%   
  arrange(desc(pick(last_col()))) %>%    
  mutate(across(-Nom, ~
                  {
                    rangs <- dense_rank(desc(replace_na(.x, -Inf)))
                    ifelse(is.na(.x), NA_character_, paste(medailles[rangs], .x))
                  })) %>%   
  kbl(escape = FALSE, align = "c", row.names = FALSE) %>%   
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = TRUE)
```

## Evolution de l'écart de point

```{r}
#| echo: false
ggplotly(donnees %>% 
           filter(Nom %in% c("Eno", "Eric", "Maël", "Marianne", "Thibaud")) %>% 
           group_by(Nom, id_match, date) %>%
           full_join(donnees %>% filter(Nom == "Thibaud") %>% transmute(id_match, date, mon_total = total), by = join_by(id_match, date)) %>%
           mutate(diff = mon_total - total) %>% ungroup() %>% filter(Nom != "Thibaud") %>%
           ggplot(aes(x = date, y = diff, colour = Nom, group = Nom,
                      text = paste0(Nom, "<br>Date : ", format(date, "%d %b"), "<br>Total : ", total, "<br>Différence : ", diff))) +
           geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed") +
           geom_point() +
           geom_line() + ylab("différence de points") +
           scale_x_datetime(date_labels = "%d %b", date_breaks = "1 day"), tooltip = "text") %>% layout(autosize = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
df <- donnees %>% 
  filter(Nom %in% c("Eno", "Eric", "Maël", "Marianne", "Thibaud")) %>%
  group_by(Nom, id_match, date) %>%
  full_join(donnees %>% filter(Nom == "Thibaud") %>% transmute(id_match, date, mon_total = total), by = join_by(id_match, date)) %>%
  mutate(diff = mon_total - total) %>% ungroup() %>% filter(Nom != "Thibaud") %>%
  mutate_at("date", as.Date) %>%
  group_by(Nom, date) %>%
  summarize(diff = last(diff), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = date, values_from = diff) %>%
  arrange(desc(pick(last_col())))

date_cols <- setdiff(names(df), "Nom")

df_num <- df  # copie des valeurs numériques

for (i in seq_along(date_cols)) {
  col      <- date_cols[i]
  prev_col <- if (i > 1) date_cols[i - 1] else NULL
  
  fleche <- if (is.null(prev_col)) {
    rep("", nrow(df))
  } else {
    case_when(
      is.na(df_num[[col]])                        ~ "",
      df_num[[col]] > df_num[[prev_col]]          ~ '<span style="color:green">▲</span>',
      df_num[[col]] == df_num[[prev_col]]         ~ '<span style="color:purple">▶</span>',
      df_num[[col]] < df_num[[prev_col]]          ~ '<span style="color:red">▼</span>'
    )
  }
  df[[col]] <- ifelse(is.na(df_num[[col]]), NA_character_, paste(fleche, df_num[[col]]))
}

df %>%
  kbl(escape = FALSE, align = "c", row.names = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = TRUE)
```
